result.contract_markdown:
# Trade Terms Agreement — Meridian Foods & NorthCart
Effective 2025-02-01. Supersedes all prior trade agreements.

## 1. Payment Terms
### 1.1 Terms
Net 30 from invoice date. Early-payment discount of 1% for payment within 10 days.
### 1.2 Deduction Settlement
Deductions taken by NorthCart against Meridian invoices are settled through Meridian's deduction review process within 60 days of remittance.

## 2. Promotional Allowances
### 2.1 Scan-Based Allowances
Scan allowances are payable per unit scanned at point of sale during the agreed promotional period, at the rate stated on the promotion authorization, up to the promotion's funding cap.
### 2.2 Display and Feature Billbacks
Display and feature billbacks are payable per the promotion authorization. Proof of performance (signed display agreement and circular tear sheet or equivalent) must accompany the claim.

## 3. Deduction Rights & Documentation
### 3.1 Authorization
NorthCart may deduct only against promotions authorized in writing by Meridian sales management, referencing the Meridian promotion ID.
### 3.2 Backup Documentation
Each deduction must include backup documentation sufficient to identify the promotion, period, items, and calculation of the amount taken.

## 4. New Item Slotting
### 4.1 Slotting Schedule
For each authorized new item: regional distribution phase (up to 900 stores) — $9,500 per item; chainwide expansion phase — $42,000 per item, invoiced upon distribution confirmation.
### 4.2 Invoicing
Slotting is deducted in the period the corresponding distribution phase is confirmed. Each phase may be deducted once per item.

## 5. Audit Window
### 5.1 Look-Back Period
Either party may audit promotional payments and deductions for 24 months following the close of the applicable fiscal quarter.

## 6. Dispute Resolution
### 6.1 Escalation Path
Unresolved deduction disputes escalate to the NorthCart category manager and Meridian sales director for joint review within 30 days.

input.justification:
NorthCart's deduction of $42,000 (ref NC-105433) maps to the authorized chainwide phase of PROMO-2026-Q1-003 (Cold Brew Oat Latte New Item Launch – Slotting Program) and is fully supported by the evidence:

1. RATE & SKU: PROMO-2026-Q1-003 authorizes a $42,000 chainwide slotting fee for SKU MF-BV-102. The claimed amount of $42,000 matches this rate exactly; no variance exists.

2. CONTRACT AUTHORITY: Contract section 4.1 establishes the chainwide expansion phase at $42,000 per item. Section 4.2 permits one deduction per phase per item, and this is the first and only chainwide-phase claim for MF-BV-102.

3. PERFORMANCE PROOF: Section 4.1 requires invoicing upon distribution confirmation. NorthCart submitted a chainwide distribution confirmation for 1,240 stores effective 2025-12-08, satisfying this requirement. 1,240 stores clearly exceeds the regional threshold (up to 900 stores), confirming this is a legitimate chainwide phase claim.

4. IN-WINDOW: The deduction date of 2025-12-18 falls within the promo window of 2025-10-01 through 2025-12-31.

5. FUNDING CAP: $42,000 is within the $51,500 total program funding cap.

6. NO DUPLICATE: Settlement history search returned no prior payment against NC-105433 or PROMO-2026-Q1-003.

All criteria for the chainwide slotting phase are met. Full payment of $42,000 is authorized.

Here's a summary of my findings:

### Case Overview
- **Retailer:** NorthCart | **Ref:** NC-105433 | **Claimed:** $42,000 | **Type:** Slotting

### Evidence Summary

| Item | Result |
|---|---|
| Authorized promo | ✅ PROMO-2026-Q1-003 — Cold Brew Oat Latte New Item Launch |
| SKU match | ✅ MF-BV-102 is the sole authorized SKU |
| Rate match | ✅ Chainwide phase = $42,000 — exact match, no variance |
| In-window | ✅ Deduction 2025-12-18 within promo window (Oct 1 – Dec 31, 2025) |
| Performance proof | ✅ Chainwide distribution confirmation: 1,240 stores as of 2025-12-08 (exceeds 900-store regional threshold, confirming chainwide phase) |
| Funding cap | ✅ $42,000 ≤ $51,500 cap |
| Duplicate check | ✅ No prior settlement found for this claim |
| Contract authority | ✅ §4.1 (chainwide = $42,000/item) + §4.2 (one deduction per phase per item) |

### Decision
Every element aligns perfectly: authorized promo, correct SKU, exact rate match, in-window deduction, required distribution confirmation on file, no duplicate. **Full approval of $42,000** is warranted. The draft is queued for human execution.
